title: KnockOutEZ/wigolo
friendlyTitle: wigolo gives coding agents a local web research tool
summary: wigolo is a fast-rising local-first web search, fetch, crawl and research service for AI coding agents, exposed through MCP and SDK integrations. The public-beta project has passed 1,100 stars and ranked third by momentum among today’s collected AI-related GitHub Trending candidates.
friendlySummary: wigolo is an open-source tool that lets AI coding agents search, fetch and crawl web pages through MCP. It is designed to run locally without a paid search API.
whyItMatters: Run it when a coding agent needs web research without sending every query through a paid search API. Its local-first approach may improve control and reduce query costs, though users should review crawl rules, licensing and the trustworthiness of retrieved pages.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Try it when your coding agent needs documentation or web research. Check the sources it finds and make sure your crawling follows website rules.
